CustomField.description: Status of Invoice or Payment or Payables or Credit Memo
CustomField.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Invoice__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice__r.leaseworks__Status__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Payment__r.leaseworks__Payment_Status__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payable__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Credit_Memo__r.leaseworks__Status__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK( leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__c )), TEXT( leaseworks__LOC_Transactions__r.leaseworks__Status__c ), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payouts__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Payouts__r.leaseworks__Status__c), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__c)), TEXT(leaseworks__Payment_on_Account__r.leaseworks__Status__c),"")))))))
CustomField.label: _Z_Unused_2310 Transaction Status
